text: DISASTER ALERT DIS001: Flood in Bharatpur district, Rajasthan. Severity: High. Affected population: 25,000 across 15 villages. Relief status: Ongoing with 8 camps housing 3,500 people. Urgent needs: Food, Medical camps, Clean water, Temporary shelter. Resources deployed: 2 NDRF teams, 4 SDRF teams, 6 medical teams. Relief materials: 500 quintals food grains, 2000 tents. Estimated damage: ₹15 crore. Control room: 0141-2550123. Nodal officer: District Collector, Bharatpur.

DISASTER ALERT DIS002: Drought in Jodhpur district, Rajasthan. Severity: Critical. Affected population: 150,000 across 120 villages since 2025-11-01. Relief status: Ongoing. Urgent needs: Drinking water, Fodder for cattle, Crop compensation. Resources deployed: 50 water tankers, 25 fodder depots. Relief materials: 1000 water tankers dispatched weekly. Estimated damage: ₹200 crore. Control room: 0291-2550456. Nodal officer: District Collector, Jodhpur.

DISASTER ALERT DIS003: Heat Wave in Jaipur district, Rajasthan. Severity: Medium. Affected population: 50,000 in urban areas. Relief status: Monitoring with 12 cool shelters housing 800 people. Urgent needs: Drinking water, Oral rehydration salts, Cool shelters. Resources deployed: 10 medical teams, 100 water points, 12 cool shelters. Control room: 0141-2550789. Nodal officer: Chief Medical Officer, Jaipur.

DISASTER ALERT DIS004: Earthquake in Kota district, Rajasthan. Magnitude: 4.2. Severity: Medium. Affected population: 5,000 across 5 villages on 2026-01-05. Relief status: Completed. Resources deployed: 1 NDRF team, 3 medical teams. Relief materials: Tents, blankets, food packets distributed. Estimated damage: ₹5 crore. Control room: 0744-2550321. Nodal officer: District Collector, Kota.

DISASTER ALERT DIS005: Industrial Accident in Bhiwadi, Rajasthan. Severity: Critical. Affected population: 200 in Industrial Zone B on 2026-01-17. Relief status: Emergency Response. Urgent needs: Emergency medical care, Evacuation support, Air quality monitoring. Resources deployed: 1 NDRF team, 5 fire brigade units, 8 medical teams, 10 ambulances. Estimated damage: Under assessment. Control room: 01493-2550999. Nodal officers: SP Bhiwadi & District Collector.
